description:
Have you heard these exciting AI news? - March 06, 2026 AI Updates Weekly
Presented by Lev Selector

Slides on GDrive: https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1dmj00iilSP-JYmriMUUaHCKz5X54e3UX?ths=true

Slides on GitHub - https://github.com/lselector/seminar
    (click on pptx file, then on "raw" or download button on the right)

-------------------------------------------------------
Question to you: 
Which "Claw" or other desktop "Digital Employee" you recommend?

-------------------------------------------------------
Need AI Consulting ?
 - Enterprise AI Solutions - https://EAIS.ai
 - Linkedin - https://www.linkedin.com/in/levselector
 - GitHub - https://github.com/lselector

-------------------------------------------------------
Our books:

"Artificial Intelligence In Business: Strategies That Work"
https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0FKZ3364G/

"AI Product Manager: Building Tomorrow"
https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0FMS9NFK9/

"How to Learn with AI?: A Practical Guide for Students, Professionals, and Self-Learners"
https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0FWLNVQMJ/

"Professional + AI: Future-Proofing Your Career"
https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0GBXLCTZQ

--------- Contents of today's video:

00:00 Introduction
00:07 AI is a 'wrecking ball' destroying SaaS
00:28 "Skills instead of SaaS"
00:45 "Your Job is to Onboard AI Agents" - Peter Yang
01:07 Crowd-sourced "LM Arena" Leaderboard
02:51 Mercury 2 by Inception Labs
03:55 OpenAI GPT-5.4 & GPT-5.3 Instant
04:58 Google Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite & Pro
05:24 Gemini Nano Banana 2
05:52 Qwen3-Coder-Next
06:13 Claude Co-Work Can Schedule Tasks
06:41 Anthropic Skill Creator tool (skill)
07:42 Claude Code MEMORY.md
08:19 Claude Code voice mode feature
09:01 Alibaba's CoPaw, ModelScope
10:20 Claude Code vs OpenClaw
10:42 Claude Code supports Remote Control
11:08 Claude now remembers your work habits
12:17 From Apps & SaaS to Generic Agent
14:46 ClawX - FREE Desktop App for OpenClaw AI Agents!
15:13 OpenClaw + Simflow AI Phone Voice Agent
15:20 Accomplish (Openwork) - AI Desktop Agent
15:42 NullClaw against OpenClaw
15:58 Harness Engineering
17:42 MaxClaw - Minimax's agent
18:16 Qwen3.5-9B - text, images, short videos
19:47 OpenClaw Tips
21:14 Tools That Make OpenClaw Actually Useful
21:43 Toggle - browser agent skill for OpenClaw
22:00 SHARE + Sidecar - Model That Learns
22:32 Kane AI (KaneAI) software testing assistant
22:40 Claude Code + Telegram bot
22:58 Apple Updates (M5, Neo)
24:02 AI Agent Making Money and Doing Marketing
24:42 The 2028 Global Intelligence Crisis report
25:38 AT&T cuts costs 90% by using multi-agent architecture
26:10 Perplexity Computer with Max Plan $200/mo
26:50 "Ilya Didn't Leave OpenAI for Nothing"
28:05 LFM2-24B-A2B Open Model from Liquid AI
28:33 CodeBuff, a new open-source AI coding agent
28:52 Humanize Text, Remove AI Accent
30:18 Antropic vs US Dept of Defense
33:42 Moonshots
34:00 Interview with Andrew Ng
34:37 SaaS Collapse into Personal AI Agents
36:40 Jobs, Layoffs, demand for AI Engineers

----

Takeaways:

1. 
The software industry is undergoing a massive shift from specialized SaaS applications to generic AI agent platforms with skills. 

Instead of buying separate apps, users will interact with one central agent and add skills or plugins for specific tasks, making traditional SaaS obsolete.

2. 
Harness engineering matters more than the model itself. Top frontier models only complete 24 percent of real-world tasks despite scoring over 90 percent on benchmarks. The infrastructure wrapped around models, including tool management, error recovery, and context tracking, is what drives real results.

3. 
Anthropic refused Pentagon contract terms requiring mass surveillance and autonomous weapons, sparking a major controversy. OpenAI signed but faced backlash and renegotiated. Meanwhile, Anthropic abandoned its safety-first pledge, stating competitive pressure destroys voluntary restraint.

----

Quotes:

"AI is not a bubble but a wrecking ball destroying traditional software as a service business model."

"The pledge does not work if competitors are racing ahead. Competitive pressure destroys voluntary restraint. The company that waits is the company that loses."

"Top frontier models only complete 24 percent of real world professional tasks despite scoring over 90 percent on benchmarks."

----

Summary:

Key themes include the rapid shift from traditional SaaS to generic AI agent platforms powered by skills and memory, with dozens of new agent tools like OpenClaw, ClawX, and MaxClaw emerging. 

Major model releases include GPT-5.4, Gemini 3.1, Mercury 2, and Qwen 3.5. 

The talk highlights harness engineering as the critical factor for real-world AI performance. 

Important - Anthropic versus Pentagon controversy over mass surveillance and autonomous weapons, and Anthropic abandoning its safety-first pledge under competitive pressure. 

Andrew Ng shares his view that AGI is likely decades away

Vertical SaaS will collapse into personalized AI agents.
----
